description: A legacy inventory application at /home/ga/legacy-migration/ fails to start because it relies on hardcoded internal DNS hostnames: 'db.inventory.local', 'cache.inventory.local', and 'auth.provider.external'. Configure the 'docker-compose.yml' to provide these network aliases for the postgres, redis, and mock-auth services respectively. The source code is immutable. The task is complete when the 'legacy-app' container runs successfully and logs 'All systems go!'.
